title: The diaspora multiplier: Curaçao at the 2026 World Cup and what the resident-population unit cannot see
description: First Cornerstone Economics Working Paper. Curaçao at the 2026 World Cup, the diaspora-as-national-capacity framing, and what the resident-population unit cannot see for small states with substantial diasporas. Empirical work covers a global panel of 202 FIFA-ranked countries, a 13-country focal panel with Transfermarkt squad valuations, and a within-Kingdom comparison across the four Aruba and Curaçao senior squads. Full reproducible R pipeline included.
